patterns.title: Clean build pipeline (score 100) — zero-failure task completion
patterns.description: Task completed with zero failures and correct status signalling. Replicable across all lanes.
patterns.name: Clean build pipeline (score 100) — zero-failure task completion
patterns.whenToUse: When building assets that require strong build health signals

patterns.title: Preview proof pattern (score 100) — verified render before gate
patterns.description: Asset rendered and proof captured before gate submission. Strong validation signal.
patterns.name: Preview proof pattern (score 100) — verified render before gate
patterns.whenToUse: When building assets that require strong preview proof signals

patterns.title: High UX visual score (100) — layout and visual hierarchy pattern
patterns.description: Asset scored highly on visual structure: clean layout, no broken elements, consistent hierarchy.
patterns.name: High UX visual score (100) — layout and visual hierarchy pattern
patterns.whenToUse: When building assets that require strong ux visual signals

patterns.title: Copy quality pattern (100) — clean, placeholder-free copy
patterns.description: Copy was clean: no placeholders, no lorem ipsum, no incomplete text. Reusable copy standards.
patterns.name: Copy quality pattern (100) — clean, placeholder-free copy
patterns.whenToUse: When building assets that require strong copy quality signals

patterns.title: Accessibility pattern (80) — lang, landmarks, alt text
patterns.description: Accessibility checks passed: lang attribute, img alt text, landmark regions present.
patterns.name: Accessibility pattern (80) — lang, landmarks, alt text
patterns.whenToUse: When building assets that require strong accessibility signals

patterns.title: SEO structure pattern (80) — title, meta, h1 hierarchy
patterns.description: SEO structure clean: title tag, meta description, h1, viewport meta all present.
patterns.name: SEO structure pattern (80) — title, meta, h1 hierarchy
patterns.whenToUse: When building assets that require strong seo signals

patterns.title: Compliance pattern (100) — legal/safety signals clean
patterns.description: Compliance signals clean: no credential leaks, no PII exposure, disclaimer pattern correct.
patterns.name: Compliance pattern (100) — legal/safety signals clean
patterns.whenToUse: When building assets that require strong compliance safety signals

patterns.title: Low rerun risk pattern (100) — idempotent, stable task flow
patterns.description: Task execution was stable and idempotent — safe to re-run without side effects.
patterns.name: Low rerun risk pattern (100) — idempotent, stable task flow
patterns.whenToUse: When building assets that require strong rerun risk signals

patterns.title: Trust-First Dark Hero with Empathetic CTA
patterns.description: Full-width hero section with trust badge row (Free/Confidential/Instant), large headline with accent colour, empathetic CTA ("I've been scammed") above fold. Converts better for distressed users than directive CTAs.
patterns.name: FHI Trust-First Hero
patterns.whenToUse: When building public-facing help or crisis pages where user is in distress or needs reassurance before taking action.
patterns.technicalNotes: Use clamp() for responsive headline, #E85D3A accent for urgency without alarm, dark bg #0A0E1A for readability.

patterns.title: Numbered Action Step Cards (mobile-first)
patterns.description: Vertical stack of ordered step cards with numbered badge (accent colour), bold action verb heading, plain-English instruction. Reduces decision paralysis for distressed users. Works for any sequential guidance flow.
patterns.name: Numbered Guidance Step Cards
patterns.whenToUse: Any sequential action sequence where user must follow steps in order. Particularly effective for crisis or high-stakes flows.
patterns.technicalNotes: Step card: flex with numbered pill, bold strong heading, muted-colour body. Gap: 14-16px. Border: 1px solid dark. Background: slightly lighter than page bg.

patterns.title: 4-Signal Trust Bar (sticky credibility)
patterns.description: 4-column trust signal bar below hero with icon, label, and short detail. Signals: compliance/regulation, privacy, cost, and speed. Collapses to 2-column on mobile. Increases credibility without cluttering hero.
patterns.name: Trust Signal Bar (4-item)
patterns.whenToUse: Any public-facing page where trust and credibility must be established quickly. Use directly below hero section.
patterns.technicalNotes: Grid: repeat(4,1fr). Icon 20px. Label bold 13px. Detail muted 11px. Bg slightly different from hero and page. Responsive: 2-col at 700px, 1-col at 420px.

patterns.title: Fraud Type Classification Matrix
patterns.description: Signal-to-type mapping with confidence scores. Input: user-described signals. Output: fraud type match with confidence. Supports multi-type matches (e.g. crypto can be investment or job scam). Threshold: 0.70.
patterns.name: Fraud Classification Engine
patterns.whenToUse: FHI fraud type detection flows. Classify user input against known fraud patterns.
patterns.technicalNotes: See engine/data/fhi-intelligence.json classificationMatrix. 10 rules, 10 signal types. Confidence threshold 0.70. Fallback: general-fraud.

patterns.title: PLAN → BUILD → PREVIEW → TEST → FIX → GATE Execution Loop
patterns.description: Governed execution loop with hard stops. Requires preview proof before gate. Max 2 fix cycles. Rollback snapshot before any mutation. Visual QA threshold 60. No auto-deploy — gate outputs READY_FOR_REVIEW only.
patterns.name: Governed Execution Loop
patterns.whenToUse: Any multi-file build task requiring governance, preview proof, and structured rollback.
patterns.technicalNotes: See engine/execution-orchestrator.ts. Hard stops: POLICY_BREACH, BLOCKED, RETRY_CAP. Audit trail: all stages logged.

patterns.title: Snapshot-Before-Mutation Rollback Pattern
patterns.description: Take file snapshot before any mutation step. On failure: restore exact original content, delete newly created files. Rollback result stored with RESTORED/PARTIAL/FAILED status. Verified: restores exact byte content.
patterns.name: Pre-Mutation Snapshot Rollback
patterns.whenToUse: Any build step that writes or modifies files. Always snapshot before first mutation in a plan.
patterns.technicalNotes: See engine/rollback.ts. takeSnapshot() → build → on failure: rollback(snapshot). Files with rollbackPoint=true are snapshotted.

patterns.title: AEO Answer-First Page Structure for Help Queries
patterns.description: Lead with a direct answer to the primary query within first 300 words. Use <ol> for step sequences. Action verbs as headings. Meta description = full 1-sentence answer. Targets featured snippet extraction by search engines.
patterns.name: AEO Featured Snippet Structure
patterns.whenToUse: Any public-facing help or instructional page targeting search traffic on how-to or what-to-do queries.
patterns.technicalNotes: H1 = primary query match. First paragraph = direct answer. <ol> not <ul> for steps. Schema.org HowTo markup recommended.

upgradeNote: pc-skill-02: added name, whenToUse, whereReusable, qualityScore, linkedPollinationRecords
